Home Shipping Quick Ship

Quick Ship

DELIVERY TIMEFRAMES

QUICK SHIP LOCKERS

Stadium, Elite & Model X
24" width · 2–4 weeks · Lock box & vented front included

When you need lockers fast, we keep Stadium, Elite, and Model X ready to ship in 2–4 weeks. Each comes in one finish—black, dark grey, or light grey—at 24" width with lock box and vented front standard. Same solid wood construction and 5-year warranty as our custom builds. We run production year-round so these are available when you need them, and we pass the savings on in our pricing.

Click any locker image below to see what’s included.

Colored melamine

Durable, moisture-resistant finish in black, dark grey, or light grey. Easy to clean and built for heavy use in locker rooms. Melamine holds up to bumps, spills, and daily wear while keeping a consistent, professional look across your space.

Stadium

$749

Black

Elite

$749

Dark grey

Model X

$749

Light grey

Maple cabinetry grade plywood

Premium hardwood tops for a classic look and long-lasting durability. Maple is used for the top of the locker, where it adds strength and a natural wood finish that pairs well with any team colors or facility style.

Semi Pro

$349

Maple

Varsity

$449

Maple

Pro

$549

Maple

Stadium

$599

Maple

Each quick ship locker includes

Secure lock box with slow-closing hinge for valuables. Included with every quick ship locker.

Secure lock box with slow-closing hinge for valuables. Included with every quick ship locker.

Vented front panel for airflow to keep gear dry and reduce odor. Standard on all quick ship models.

Interior hooks for bags, helmets, and everyday gear. Standard layout included.

24" width (Stadium 24" deep). Full 5-year warranty on every quick ship locker.

PlayerStall

Custom wood locker rooms for collegiate and professional programs. Priced right. Built to last. 30+ years of craftsmanship.
